name: dev-agent-teams
description: Multi-agent development pipeline: investigate → design → implement → review → PR

dashboardApp.title: Dashboard app directory
dashboardApp.description: Local clone of the dashboard app repo (https://github.com/naut1402/agent-workflow). The /dev-dashboard skill clones it here, and the dev-team-dashboard MCP server runs from it. Default: ~/.dev-team-dashboard/app

dashboardHome.title: Dashboard registry home
dashboardHome.description: Directory holding the multi-project registry (projects.json) and runners.json. Default: ~/.dev-team-dashboard
